{"cards": [{"name": "Astral Enforcer", "mana_cost": "{1}{W}{U}", "cmc": 3, "colors": ["W", "U"], "color_identity": ["W", "U"], "type_line": "Creature — Spirit Detective", "oracle_text": "Flying
When ~ enters, exile target nonland permanent until ~ leaves the battlefield.
Whenever ~ attacks, scry 1.", "flavor_text": ""Justice sees all, even across the veil of worlds."", "power": "2", "toughness": "3", "loyalty": null, "rarity": "uncommon", "design_notes": "Azorius archetype signpost combining white's exile-based removal with blue's flying and scry. The ETB creates tempo advantage while flying and scry provide card selection and evasion. Stats are slightly below curve to account for the powerful enter ability."}, {"name": "Bloodpact Tormentor", "mana_cost": "{2}{B}{R}", "cmc": 4, "colors": ["B", "R"], "color_identity": ["B", "R"], "type_line": "Creature — Demon Warrior", "oracle_text": "Menace
When ~ enters, each opponent loses 2 life and you draw a card.
{1}{B}{R}, Sacrifice a creature: ~ deals 3 damage to any target.", "flavor_text": "Power demands sacrifice, and sacrifice demands power.", "power": "3", "toughness": "3", "loyalty": null, "rarity": "rare", "design_notes": "Rakdos build-around that rewards aggressive sacrifice strategies. ETB provides immediate value in both colors (life loss and card draw), while the activated ability converts creatures into direct damage. Menace ensures it applies pressure. Build-around potential with sacrifice synergies."}, {"name": "Traveler's Compass", "mana_cost": "{2}", "cmc": 2, "colors": [], "color_identity": [], "type_line": "Artifact", "oracle_text": "{T}: Add {C}.
{1}, {T}, Sacrifice ~: Search your library for a basic land card, reveal it, put it into your hand, then shuffle.", "flavor_text": "Every path leads somewhere worth going.", "power": null, "toughness": null, "loyalty": null, "rarity": "common", "design_notes": "Simple mana rock with land-fixing utility. The sacrifice ability provides mana fixing for multicolor decks at common complexity. Fair rate for the effect - costs mana and the artifact itself to tutor a basic land."}, {"name": "Prismatic Engine", "mana_cost": "{4}", "cmc": 4, "colors": [], "color_identity": [], "type_line": "Artifact", "oracle_text": "{T}: Add {C}{C}.
{2}, {T}: Add one mana of any color.
{5}, {T}: Draw a card, then you may put a land card from your hand onto the battlefield.", "flavor_text": null, "power": null, "toughness": null, "loyalty": null, "rarity": "rare", "design_notes": "Complex artifact with three activated abilities of increasing cost and power. First ability provides raw mana, second gives color fixing, third provides card advantage and ramp. Each ability uses tap, creating interesting sequencing decisions. High cost balances the versatility."}, {"name": "Seraph of Divine Wrath", "mana_cost": "{3}{W}{B}", "cmc": 5, "colors": ["W", "B"], "color_identity": ["W", "B"], "type_line": "Legendary Planeswalker — Seraph", "oracle_text": "+1: Exile target creature. Its controller gains life equal to its power.
-2: Return target creature card from your graveyard to the battlefield. It gains lifelink until end of turn.
-7: You get an emblem with "Whenever a creature you control dies, return it to the battlefield under your control at the beginning of the next end step."", "flavor_text": null, "power": null, "toughness": null, "loyalty": "4", "rarity": "mythic", "design_notes": "Orzhov planeswalker blending white's exile removal with black's reanimation. The +1 removes threats while giving opponent life (white's compensation philosophy). The -2 reanimates with lifelink (white enhancement of black effect). Ultimate creates recursive value engine fitting both colors. Starting loyalty of 4 balances power level."}]}
